svg.title: Multi-head attention using gemmStridedBatched
svg.desc: Four attention heads shown as horizontal rows. Each head has Q times K-transpose producing scores, then softmax on CPU, then scores times V producing output. Two purple batched GEMM calls cover all four heads simultaneously. Softmax is a gray CPU step in between.
svg.text: multi-head attention — H=4 heads, 2 batched calls
H=4 heads → 2 batched calls instead of 2×4=8 sequential calls
